data.title: Global glass substrates for semiconductors market report for 2026-2036 with profiles of 35 key players, offering insights on semiconductor industry trends.
data.description: A report titled "The Global Market for Glass Substrates for Semiconductors 2026-2036" has been included in the offerings of ResearchAndMarkets.com. The report focuses on the Global Glass Substrate for Semiconductors Market between 2026-2036, offering crucial insights for semiconductor manufacturers, substrate suppliers, equipment providers, and technology investors amidst this significant shift. It covers seven key application segments and provides comprehensive analysis for stakeholders. This report is essential for understanding the market dynamics in the semiconductor industry.

data.title: Delta Air Lines (NYSE: DAL) reported Q3 FY2025 earnings, revenue grew 4%, pre-tax income $1.5 billion, earnings $1.71 per share, operating margin 11.2%, free cash flow $830 million, expected full year earnings $6 per share, operating margin double digits in December quarter. Strong focus on customer experience, premium offerings, loyalty programs, and financial performance. Executives optimistic about future growth, strategic investments, fleet renewal.
data.description: Delta Air Lines, Inc. (DAL) released its third-quarter financial results, reporting a 4% revenue growth, pre-tax income of $1.5 billion, earnings of $1.71 per share, and an 11.2% operating margin. The company generated a return on invested capital of 13% and free cash flow of $830 million for the quarter, totaling $2.8 billion year-to-date. Delta anticipates delivering a double-digit operating margin in the December quarter, with full-year earnings expected to reach approximately $6 per share, in the upper half of July's guidance. The airline has accrued nearly $1 billion year-to-date for profit-sharing and remains optimistic about future financial performance. Delta's revenue for the September quarter was $15.2 billion, a third-quarter record, with total unit revenue improving by 0.3% and domestic unit revenue turning positive. Corporate sales trended positively, contributing to a 8% increase over the prior year. Loyalty revenue improved by 9%, with travel adjacent products growing mid-teens. The airline's co-branded partnership with American Express led to increased revenue and engagement. Delta continues to focus on enhancing the customer experience, with investments in premium products and services, airport infrastructure, and technological advancements. The company remains committed to profitable growth, margin expansion, disciplined capital allocation, and maintaining a strong financial foundation. Diligent execution supports low single-digit non-fuel unit cost growth, with an outlook for increased revenue and earnings in the December quarter. The airline aims to generate $3.5-4 billion in free cash flow for the year, aligned with long-term goals to drive sustained shareholder value.

data.title: Animoca Brands introduces MOCA Coin, SAND, and EDU tokens on Bullish in Hong Kong, expanding digital asset choices on the licensed exchange.
data.description: Animoca Brands has introduced its MOCA Coin, SAND, and EDU tokens on Bullish, the inaugural Hong Kong exchange to receive a license from the SFC. This move expands digital asset trading opportunities for users.

data.title: Lightship Security and OpenSSL Corporation submit OpenSSL 3.5.4 for FIPS 140-3 validation, partnering from Oct 9, 2025.
data.description: In a recent announcement on October 9, 2025, Lightship Security, a subsidiary of Applus+ Laboratories and a recognized cryptographic security test lab, along with the OpenSSL Corporation, a key maintainer of the OpenSSL Library, revealed the submission of OpenSSL version 3.5.4. This marks a significant stride in enhancing cryptographic security protocols and ensuring robustness in digital encryption technology.

data.title: 5G Americas releases white paper on AI-driven networks. Focus on self-managing ANs to meet demands of 5G, AI, IoT.
data.description: A new white paper titled "Enabling Intent-Based Autonomous Networks" has been released by 5G Americas, a prominent organization advocating for 5G and beyond in the Americas. This publication delves into the potential of AI-driven, self-configuring, and self-healing systems for meeting the increasing complexities posed by 5G, AI, IoT, and cloud-native services. The report focuses on technologies, standards, and strategies that empower Intent-Based Autonomous Networks (ANs) to effectively address these demands.

data.title: Namib Minerals partners with WSP for feasibility studies on Redwing and Mazowe Gold assets in Zimbabwe.
data.description: On October 9, 2025, Namib Minerals, an African Gold producer listed on Nasdaq as NAMM, revealed its decision to collaborate with WSP, a top professional services firm, to undertake thorough feasibility studies for its Redwing and Mazowe Gold mining assets in Zimbabwe. Namib Minerals boasts a range of mining and exploration holdings in Zimbabwe and the Democratic Republic of Congo. This initiative signifies a significant step forward for the company as it aims to enhance its operations and maximize the potential of these assets.

data.title: KOIL Energy commends Beacon Offshore Energy for first oil extraction in Shenandoah field in Gulf of America.
data.description: In Houston on October 9, 2025, KOIL Energy Solutions, Inc. praised Beacon Offshore Energy LLC for achieving its initial oil production in the Shenandoah deepwater field within the Gulf of America. KOIL Energy Solutions, a leading player in deepwater energy equipment and services, commended Beacon on this milestone within the energy sector. Beacon Offshore Energy LLC's successful endeavor marks a significant advancement in oil exploration and production in the region.

data.title: Smith+Nephew receives CPT code for CARTIHEAL AGILI-C Implant starting Jan 1, 2027 (NYSE:SNN, #CPT, effective date)
data.description: Smith+Nephew revealed today that the American Medical Association (AMA) CPT Editorial Panel has introduced a Category I CPT code for procedures utilizing its CARTIHEAL AGILI-C Cartilage Repair Implant. The code will be effective starting January 1, 2027. Smith+Nephew is a leading medical technology company listed on the London Stock Exchange (LSE: SN) and the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE: SNN).

data.title: Redtiger introduces F17 Plus, a quad-lens dash cam with rear cabin camera for comprehensive video coverage.
data.description: The Redtiger F17 Plus, launched in Dallas on Oct. 9, 2025, sets itself apart with a specialized rear cabin camera in addition to the standard features present in typical dash cams. This innovative addition allows the device to record both interior and exterior happenings of the vehicle. Created by popular brand Redtiger, known for their dash cams and automotive accessories, the F17 Plus introduces a new level of surveillance with its enhanced capabilities.

data.title: V&V Supremo congratulates Dennis and Mary Kay Dorn for winning at the International Guernsey Show 2025.
data.description: In Madison, Wisconsin on October 9, 2025, V&V Supremo® Foods celebrates the achievements of Dennis and Mary Kay Dorn from Kadence Farm in New Glarus, WI. Their cow, Kadence Fames Lovely ("Fame"), stood out at the International Guernsey Show 2025.
